title = 'Support Cub Scout Packs at Their Pinewood Derbies'

categories = ['Announcements']
+++
<p><img decoding="async" class="alignleft" style="border: 0px; margin: 2px 6px;" alt="" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="192" height="186">Troop 55 Scouts &#8211; Please help support our sister Cub Scout Packs at their Pinewood Derby events. &nbsp;Contact <a href="javascript:DeCryptX('0s1u2c2e0y2n1c0e3o2n2B2{3d0h0o0o0.3f2q2o')">Ms. Bell</a> to schedule a time-slot.</p>
<p><strong><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Pack 55&#8217;s Pinewood Derby<br />
</span></strong>Saturday, January 18th<strong><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><br />
</span></strong>10-4pm (9am setup)<br />
Forestville Elementary School</p>
<p><strong><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Pack 673&#8217;s Pinewood Derby</span><br />
</strong>Saturday, January 25th<strong><br />
</strong>8-2pm&nbsp;<br />
Great Falls Elementary School</p>
